description: ContinuousExportDescription schema from Amazon Application Discovery Service API

exportId.description: The unique ID assigned to this export.

status.description: Describes the status of the export. Can be one of the following values — START_IN_PROGRESS, START_FAILED, ACTIVE, ERROR, STOP_IN_PROGRESS, STOP_FAILED, INACTIVE.

statusDetail.description: Contains information about any errors that have occurred.

s3Bucket.description: The name of the s3 bucket where the export data parquet files are stored.

startTime.description: The timestamp representing when the continuous export was started.

stopTime.description: The timestamp representing when the continuous export was stopped.

dataSource.description: The type of data collector used to gather this data.

schemaStorageConfig.description: An object which describes how the data is stored.
